description_long: This gate consists of two adjacent sections, each framed by sturdy vertical wooden posts with a natural brown finish. The main body of the gate is composed of evenly spaced vertical black metal bars, providing both security and visibility through the structure. The tops of the wooden posts are capped, and the bases appear to have green protective coverings, possibly to prevent rot or damage from ground contact. The design is simple and functional, with no visible decorative motifs or embellishments. The gate is likely intended for use in urban or suburban environments, such as driveways, parks, or residential entrances. The construction suggests durability and resistance to weather, with materials chosen for strength and longevity.
description: A double-section gate with vertical black metal bars framed by brown wooden posts, featuring green base covers for protection. The design is functional and sturdy, suitable for urban or residential entrances.
description_view_0: Front view showing both gate sections, vertical black bars, and brown wooden posts with green bases clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the gate, emphasizing the thickness of the wooden posts and the alignment of the metal bars.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the same arrangement of bars and posts, with minimal visible differences.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and the structure of the wooden posts.
